Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The scratching of pencils echoes[n]throughout the art room...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's been so fun that the hours flew by.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wonder if he's working hard[n]at his studies right now...[n]{f 1 1}
